message: Approved-family suites must use AES-256-GCM at the protocol AEAD layer
Approved-family suites must use SHA-384 or SHA-512
Approved-family suites must use a module-managed or module-approved IV/nonce construction
Approved-family suites must not allow research-only algorithms
Approved-family suites require a referenced validated cryptographic module
Raw custom transport is harder to accredit than TLS/IPsec/SSH bindings
